    ICacheListener<T>
    Interface for listening to changes in a preference map cache.
    IMapRefSolver<T>
    Common protocol for preference references solvers.
    IPrefElementTranslator<U>
    This interface is used to translate elements of a complex string preference such as: list elements map elements ... to their object equivalent and vice-versa.
    IPreferenceCheckResult
    Common protocol for preference check results.
    IPrefMapEntry<T>
    Interface describing an entry of a preference map.
    IReferenceMaker<T>
    Common protocol for reference makers.
    IXMLPrefSerializer<T>
    Common protocol for xml preference translators.
